sourcesContent:
import './Experience.css'; const Experience = () => { const experiences = [ { id: 1, title: "Data Analyst and AI/ML Intern", company: "ProcMart India", period: "May 2025 - Present", location: "Noida/Remote", description: "Leading AI/ML development for e-commerce solutions, focusing on computer vision and automated product management systems.", achievements: [ "Developed lightning-fast image search tool achieving sub-1 second retrieval times", "Built smart text-adding system for automatic product image annotation", "Implemented FAISS-powered visual database for product matching", "Created automated blank region detection for optimal text placement" ], technologies: ["Python", "OpenCV", "FAISS", "Computer Vision"] }, { id: 2, title: "Web Development Intern", company: "Brainwave Matrix Solutions", period: "March 2025 - Present", location: "Noida/Remote", description: "Full-stack development of web applications with focus on user experience and scalable architecture.", achievements: [ "Designed and developed blogging platform with complete content management", "Built day planner website with responsive, user-friendly interfaces", "Implemented secure user authentication and authorization systems", "Created RESTful APIs ensuring data integrity and optimal performance" ], technologies: ["React", "Node.js", "Express.js", "MongoDB", "JavaScript", "HTML", "CSS"] } ]; const stats = [ { number: "4+", label: "Active Roles" }, { number: "2+", label: "Years Experience" }, { number: "15+", label: "Technologies" }, { number: "3", label: "Industries" } ]; const education = [ { degree: "B.Tech in Computer Science", institution: "SRM Institute of Science & Technology", location: "Kattankulathur", period: "2023 - Present", grade: "8.9 CGPA", status: "Currently Pursuing" }, { degree: "Intermediate (12th)", institution: "Delhi Public School Ghaziabad", location: "Ghaziabad", period: "2023", grade: "80%", status: "Completed" }, { degree: "Matriculation (10th)", institution: "Delhi Public School Ghaziabad", location: "Ghaziabad", period: "2021", grade: "90%", status: "Completed" } ]; return (

); }; export default Experience;
